a:T19a1,<div class="specification">
<p>A section of mRNA contains the start codon for translation of a polypeptide by the ribosomes.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Identify the nucleotides of the start codon for the polypeptide.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">State the chemical difference between the 5' end and the 3' end of a DNA strand.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Within the base sequence shown in the diagram, the sequence for the stop codon UGA appears. Explain the reasons for translation continuing beyond this point in the mRNA.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Describe how bioinformatics can help identify genes within the DNA of an organism.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>b:T581,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">AUG ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">5′ end contains a phosphate group «on carbon 5»<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>3′ carbon contains a hydroxyl/OH group «on carbon 3» ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">a. the gene code occurs in triplets ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">b. the stop codon would not be part of the reading frame ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">c. the code for a polypeptide would contain more codons ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">a. bioinformatics is the application of computer technology to biological information<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>information is stored in a database<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>bioinformatics is used in analyzing genomes ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">b. allows for searches/comparisons/analysis of ORF/open reading frame ✔</p>
<p style="text-align: left;">c. the computer searches for a start codon and a stop codon «and within a distance of 60+ codons» ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/b/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","b"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.3.SL.TZ0.10"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","b-2-biotechnology-in-agriculture, b-5-bioinformatics"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">d.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
